name: EOS Russia
summary: EOS Russia is a publicly owned investment manager. The firm manages separate client-focused equity portfolios. It invests in the public equity markets of Russia. The firm primarily invests in value stocks of companies. It typically invests in companies in the energy and power sectors, including vertically integrated utilities, thermal and hydro generation companies, distribution companies, transmission companies, service companies, supply companies, utility asset construction companies and equipment suppliers to the utility companies. EOS Russia was founded in 2007 and is based in Stockholm, Sweden.
